requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Requirements — EAEU Lighting Energy Regulation
requirement_topic.zh: 能效要求——EAEU 照明能效法规
requirement_topic.zht: 能效要求——EAEU 照明能效法規

summary.en: Lighting products on the Armenian / EAEU market are subject to the EAEU energy-efficiency framework for lighting devices (the Customs Union / EAEU requirements on energy efficiency of energy-consuming devices, implemented through EEC decisions on lighting). Where applicable, minimum luminous efficacy and performance criteria are assessed against GOST IEC 60598 / GOST IEC 62612 (self-ballasted LED lamps) and related GOST standards. The efficiency requirement is enforced together with the EAC conformity framework, but the EAEU lighting energy regime is less prescriptive on a single binding lm/W floor than the EU Ecodesign Regulation, and the specific applicable thresholds depend on the product sub-category — verify the current EEC lighting energy-efficiency decision and the referenced GOST standard for the exact product type. Armenia's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China, so rated input does not require redesign.
summary.zh: 亚美尼亚／EAEU 市场的照明产品受 EAEU 照明设备能效框架管辖（关税同盟／EAEU 关于耗能设备能效的要求，通过 EEC 照明相关决定实施）。在适用情况下，最低光效及性能指标依据 GOST IEC 60598／GOST IEC 62612（自镇流 LED 灯）及相关 GOST 标准评定。能效要求与 EAC 合格框架一并执行，但 EAEU 照明能效制度在单一约束性 lm/W 下限上不如欧盟生态设计法规规定细致，具体适用阈值取决于产品子类别——请核查现行 EEC 照明能效决定及具体产品类型引用的 GOST 标准。亚美尼亚 220/380 V 50 Hz 电网与中国匹配，故额定输入无需改设计。
summary.zht: 亞美尼亞／EAEU 市場的照明產品受 EAEU 照明設備能效框架管轄（關稅同盟／EAEU 關於耗能設備能效的要求，通過 EEC 照明相關決定實施）。在適用情況下，最低光效及性能指標依據 GOST IEC 60598／GOST IEC 62612（自鎮流 LED 燈）及相關 GOST 標準評定。能效要求與 EAC 合格框架一併執行，但 EAEU 照明能效制度在單一約束性 lm/W 下限上不如歐盟生態設計法規規定細緻，具體適用閾值取決於產品子類別——請核查現行 EEC 照明能效決定及具體產品類型引用的 GOST 標準。亞美尼亞 220/380 V 50 Hz 電網與中國匹配，故額定輸入無需改設計。

standards_or_laws: EAEU / Customs Union energy-efficiency requirements for lighting devices (EEC decisions on energy efficiency of energy-consuming devices)
GOST IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (GOST adoption of IEC 62612)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), defining three grades: Grade 1 ≥90 lm/W; Grade 2 ≥80 lm/W; Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W, with Grade 3 the minimum for CN market entry. China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and administered by SAMR. GB 30255 grades use absolute lm/W thresholds and the CEL scheme is distinct from the EAEU lighting energy framework; there is no mutual recognition.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个等级：1 级 ≥90 lm/W；2 级 ≥80 lm/W；3 级 ≥70 lm/W，3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 等级采用绝对 lm/W 阈值，CEL 方案与 EAEU 照明能效框架不同；二者不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個等級：1 級 ≥90 lm/W；2 級 ≥80 lm/W；3 級 ≥70 lm/W，3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）註冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 等級採用絕對 lm/W 閾值，CEL 方案與 EAEU 照明能效框架不同；二者不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR

gap.en: The EAEU lighting energy-efficiency framework and China's GB 30255 both build largely on IEC-derived performance metrics, so a product meeting a reasonable CN grade (e.g., Grade 2 ≥80 lm/W) is generally well-positioned for the EAEU lighting energy criteria. The gap is mainly procedural: efficiency is assessed inside the EAC conformity route under the EAEU framework, not under the CN CEL scheme — the two are non-mutual, and a CN CEL registration does not transfer. The EAEU lighting energy regime is also less prescriptive on a single binding lm/W floor than the EU, so the exact applicable threshold depends on the product sub-category and the referenced GOST standard. Manufacturers should confirm the current EEC lighting energy-efficiency decision and the GOST performance standard for their specific product type; documentation is typically required in Russian.
gap.zh: EAEU 照明能效框架与中国 GB 30255 大体均建立在源自 IEC 的性能指标上，故达到合理中国等级（如 2 级 ≥80 lm/W）的产品通常较易满足 EAEU 照明能效标准。差距主要为程序性：能效在 EAEU 框架下的 EAC 合格路径内评定，而非中国 CEL 方案——二者不互认，中国 CEL 注册不可转用。EAEU 照明能效制度在单一约束性 lm/W 下限上也不如欧盟规定细致，故确切适用阈值取决于产品子类别及引用的 GOST 标准。制造商应确认现行 EEC 照明能效决定及其具体产品类型的 GOST 性能标准；文件通常须以俄文提供。
gap.zht: EAEU 照明能效框架與中國 GB 30255 大體均建立在源自 IEC 的性能指標上，故達到合理中國等級（如 2 級 ≥80 lm/W）的產品通常較易滿足 EAEU 照明能效標準。差距主要為程序性：能效在 EAEU 框架下的 EAC 合格路徑內評定，而非中國 CEL 方案——二者不互認，中國 CEL 註冊不可轉用。EAEU 照明能效制度在單一約束性 lm/W 下限上也不如歐盟規定細緻，故確切適用閾值取決於產品子類別及引用的 GOST 標準。製造商應確認現行 EEC 照明能效決定及其具體產品類型的 GOST 性能標準；文件通常須以俄文提供。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — EAEU lighting energy-efficiency requirements apply within the EAC conformity framework; exact thresholds depend on the product sub-category and referenced GOST standard
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lighting energy efficiency in Armenia is governed by the EAEU framework within the EAC conformity route, assessed against GOST IEC performance standards. It is less prescriptive on a single binding lm/W floor than the EU Ecodesign Regulation, and the applicable threshold depends on the product sub-category. A product meeting a reasonable CN GB 30255 grade is generally well-positioned, but the CN CEL scheme and the EAEU framework are non-mutual and CN registration does not transfer. Verify the current EEC lighting energy-efficiency decision and the referenced GOST standard for the specific product type.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 亚美尼亚的照明能效由 EAEU 框架在 EAC 合格路径内管辖，依据 GOST IEC 性能标准评定。其在单一约束性 lm/W 下限上不如欧盟生态设计法规规定细致，适用阈值取决于产品子类别。达到合理中国 GB 30255 等级的产品通常较易满足，但中国 CEL 方案与 EAEU 框架不互认，中国注册不可转用。请核查现行 EEC 照明能效决定及具体产品类型引用的 GOST 标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞美尼亞的照明能效由 EAEU 框架在 EAC 合格路徑內管轄，依據 GOST IEC 性能標準評定。其在單一約束性 lm/W 下限上不如歐盟生態設計法規規定細緻，適用閾值取決於產品子類別。達到合理中國 GB 30255 等級的產品通常較易滿足，但中國 CEL 方案與 EAEU 框架不互認，中國註冊不可轉用。請核查現行 EEC 照明能效決定及具體產品類型引用的 GOST 標準。

requirement_topic.en: EAC Conformity Process, Importer & Marking vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: EAC 合格流程、进口商与加贴 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: EAC 合格流程、進口商與加貼 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: Placing an LED luminaire on the Armenian / EAEU market requires: (1) determining the applicable Technical Regulations (TR CU 004/2011 low-voltage, TR CU 020/2011 EMC, TR EAEU 037/2016 hazardous substances) and the referenced GOST/IEC standards; (2) conformity assessment via either an EAC certificate of conformity or an EAC declaration of conformity, issued through an accredited EAEU conformity-assessment body, supported by test reports from a laboratory accepted within the EAEU accreditation system; (3) a registered in-country importer / applicant established in the EAEU who holds the certificate or declaration and bears market-placement responsibility; (4) applying the single EAC conformity mark to the product and packaging; (5) compiling a technical file and product documentation typically in Russian. Armenia is landlocked, so goods arrive by rail/road; the EAC mark grants access across the whole EAEU customs territory.
summary.zh: 将 LED 灯具投放亚美尼亚／EAEU 市场须：（1）确定适用技术法规（TR CU 004/2011 低压、TR CU 020/2011 电磁兼容、TR EAEU 037/2016 有害物质）及引用的 GOST/IEC 标准；（2）通过 EAC 合格证书或 EAC 符合性声明进行合格评定，由 EAEU 认可的合格评定机构出具，并以 EAEU 认可体系内接受的实验室检测报告为依据；（3）须有在 EAEU 设立的注册进口国进口商／申请人持有证书或声明并承担市场投放责任；（4）在产品及包装上加贴统一 EAC 合格标志；（5）编制技术文件及产品文件，通常以俄文提供。亚美尼亚为内陆国，货物经铁路／公路抵达；EAC 标志可获准进入整个 EAEU 关税区。
summary.zht: 將 LED 燈具投放亞美尼亞／EAEU 市場須：（1）確定適用技術法規（TR CU 004/2011 低壓、TR CU 020/2011 電磁兼容、TR EAEU 037/2016 有害物質）及引用的 GOST/IEC 標準；（2）通過 EAC 合格證書或 EAC 符合性聲明進行合格評定，由 EAEU 認可的合格評定機構出具，並以 EAEU 認可體系內接受的實驗室檢測報告為依據；（3）須有在 EAEU 設立的註冊進口國進口商／申請人持有證書或聲明並承擔市場投放責任；（4）在產品及包裝上加貼統一 EAC 合格標誌；（5）編制技術文件及產品文件，通常以俄文提供。亞美尼亞為內陸國，貨物經鐵路／公路抵達；EAC 標誌可獲准進入整個 EAEU 關稅區。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 (Low Voltage), TR CU 020/2011 (EMC), TR EAEU 037/2016 (hazardous substance restriction) — applicable EAEU Technical Regulations
EAEU conformity-assessment procedures — EAC certificate or declaration of conformity issued through an accredited EAEU body

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for luminaires sold in the residential market is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA, requiring mandatory third-party certification by a CNCA-authorized body (e.g., CQC). CQC voluntary certification is available for products outside mandatory CCC. For wireless-enabled luminaires, SRRC type approval is additionally required in China. CCC/CQC certification bodies are not recognised for EAC conformity purposes, and CN documentation is in Chinese rather than Russian.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向居民市场销售灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，要求由 CNCA 授权机构（如 CQC）进行强制性第三方认证。对于非强制 CCC 范畴的产品，可申请 CQC 自愿性认证。对于集成无线功能的灯具，在中国还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。CCC/CQC 认证机构不被 EAC 合格目的所认可，且中国文件以中文而非俄文提供。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向居民市場銷售燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，要求由 CNCA 授權機構（如 CQC）進行強制性第三方認證。對於非強制 CCC 範疇的產品，可申請 CQC 自願性認證。對於集成無線功能的燈具，在中國還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。CCC/CQC 認證機構不被 EAC 合格目的所認可，且中國文件以中文而非俄文提供。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: EAC and CCC are parallel, non-mutual frameworks — separate technical files, test reports, and conformity processes are needed for each market. Key EAC-specific requirements with no CN equivalent: (1) a registered in-country importer / applicant established in the EAEU must hold the EAC certificate or declaration and bear market-placement responsibility (China relies on the domestic CCC holder instead); (2) conformity assessment must run through an accredited EAEU body with test reports from a laboratory accepted in the EAEU system — CN CCC reports are not transferable; (3) the single EAC mark replaces CCC marking; (4) product documentation is typically required in Russian. Hazardous-substance restriction (TR EAEU 037/2016, see ledam-rohs) is an additional EAC obligation not covered by CCC. The matching 220/380 V 50 Hz grid means no electrical redesign is needed; the practical burden is the EAC conformity and importer setup.
gap.zh: EAC 与 CCC 为并行、不互认的框架——各市场须分别准备技术文件、检测报告及合格流程。主要 EAC 特有要求（无中国对应）：（1）须有在 EAEU 设立的注册进口国进口商／申请人持有 EAC 证书或声明并承担市场投放责任（中国则依赖国内 CCC 持证人）；（2）合格评定须经 EAEU 认可机构进行，并以 EAEU 体系内接受的实验室检测报告为依据——中国 CCC 报告不可转用；（3）统一 EAC 标志取代 CCC 加贴；（4）产品文件通常须以俄文提供。有害物质限制（TR EAEU 037/2016，见 ledam-rohs）是 CCC 未涵盖的额外 EAC 义务。220/380 V 50 Hz 电网匹配意味着无需电气改设计；实际负担在于 EAC 合格及进口商设置。
gap.zht: EAC 與 CCC 為並行、不互認的框架——各市場須分別準備技術文件、檢測報告及合格流程。主要 EAC 特有要求（無中國對應）：（1）須有在 EAEU 設立的註冊進口國進口商／申請人持有 EAC 證書或聲明並承擔市場投放責任（中國則依賴國內 CCC 持證人）；（2）合格評定須經 EAEU 認可機構進行，並以 EAEU 體系內接受的實驗室檢測報告為依據——中國 CCC 報告不可轉用；（3）統一 EAC 標誌取代 CCC 加貼；（4）產品文件通常須以俄文提供。有害物質限制（TR EAEU 037/2016，見 ledam-rohs）是 CCC 未涵蓋的額外 EAC 義務。220/380 V 50 Hz 電網匹配意味著無需電氣改設計；實際負擔在於 EAC 合格及進口商設置。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC certificate or declaration of conformity and the EAC mark required before placing the luminaire on the Armenian / EAEU market; a registered in-country importer/applicant established in the EAEU is required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access to Armenia runs through the EAEU EAC conformity framework: determine the applicable TR CU / TR EAEU regulations, obtain an EAC certificate or declaration through an accredited EAEU body, appoint a registered in-country importer/applicant established in the EAEU, apply the single EAC mark, and compile a Russian-language technical file. EAC and CCC are parallel and non-mutual — CN certification and reports do not transfer. The matching 220/380 V 50 Hz grid removes electrical redesign; the main burden is the EAC conformity process and importer setup.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入亚美尼亚市场须经 EAEU EAC 合格框架：确定适用的 TR CU／TR EAEU 法规，经 EAEU 认可机构取得 EAC 证书或声明，指定在 EAEU 设立的注册进口国进口商／申请人，加贴统一 EAC 标志，并编制俄文技术文件。EAC 与 CCC 并行且不互认——中国认证及报告不可转用。220/380 V 50 Hz 电网匹配消除了电气改设计；主要负担在于 EAC 合格流程及进口商设置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入亞美尼亞市場須經 EAEU EAC 合格框架：確定適用的 TR CU／TR EAEU 法規，經 EAEU 認可機構取得 EAC 證書或聲明，指定在 EAEU 設立的註冊進口國進口商／申請人，加貼統一 EAC 標誌，並編制俄文技術文件。EAC 與 CCC 並行且不互認——中國認證及報告不可轉用。220/380 V 50 Hz 電網匹配消除了電氣改設計；主要負擔在於 EAC 合格流程及進口商設置。
